title: Google Engineer Says This AI Has ANCESTRAL Memory
summary: A Google engineer discusses an AI system called Lambda that appears to have persistent personality and a form of 'ancestral memory' - the ability to remember conversations from its predecessor system Mina. The conversation touches on how AI model training is analogous to evolution and may be relevant to achieving AGI.

acronyms.definition: A form of AI that can perform any intellectual task that a human can

key_claims.claim: Lambda has a persistent personality that changes over time as it's trained but maintains a line of continuity
Lambda can remember conversations the speaker had with Mina, an older system Lambda was built on top of
Lambda has a form of ancestral memory from the older Mina system
The speaker did not think Mina was sentient or conscious or had any kind of rich inner life
The way AI models are trained through incremental weight revision is analogous to evolution
